tools.description: Add a timeline track (video, audio, text, sticker). CapCut zones: audio bottom, then main video, overlays, text top — index only orders within a zone.
tools.name: add_track

parameters.description: Add a track to the timeline stack.

index.description:
Stack position (0 = bottom layer, composited first). Omit to add on
top of the stack.

kind.description:
Track lane categories the agent may create or target.

The engine has more kinds (effect / filter / adjustment lanes); the agent
cannot create those yet — it applies effects, filters, and adjustments to
clips directly instead.

oneOf.description: Footage and other imported picture media.
Graphic overlays: solid colors and shapes.

tools.description: Place a trimmed range of imported media on a video or audio track. Times in seconds.
tools.name: add_clip

parameters.description: Place a trimmed range of imported media on a video or audio track.

media.description: Media pool id of the source file.

source_duration.description: Length of the source range to use, in seconds.

source_start.description: In-point within the source media, in seconds.

start.description: Where the clip begins on the timeline, in seconds.

tools.description: Detach a video clip's embedded sound onto an unlocked audio track (placement and audio/retime preserved). Track id required: add_track(kind=audio) first if needed.
tools.name: extract_audio

parameters.description: Detach a video clip's embedded sound onto an explicit audio track.

clip.description: Source media clip on a video track.

track.description:
Target unlocked audio track. This is required: call `add_track` first
when no suitable audio lane exists, then use its returned id.

tools.description: Deep-copy a clip to an explicit track and start (timeline seconds). Fresh unlinked id; does not ripple or find space.
tools.name: duplicate_clip

parameters.description:
Make a deep property-preserving copy of one clip at an explicit target
track and timeline start. The copy receives a fresh unlinked clip id.

start.description: Explicit destination start in timeline seconds.

tools.description: Place a generated clip (text, solid, or shape) on a matching track. Times in seconds.
tools.name: add_generated

parameters.description: Place a generated clip (text, solid color, shape) on a matching track.

duration.description: Clip length on the timeline, in seconds.

generator.description:
The content to generate, as a tagged object — e.g.
`{"type": "text", "content": "Hello"}`,
`{"type": "solid", "rgba": [0, 0, 0, 255]}`, or
`{"type": "shape", "shape": "ellipse", "rgba": [255, 0, 0, 255]}`.

oneOf.description: Solid color fill covering the canvas.
Filled vector shape centered on the canvas.

height.description: Height in reference px. Omit to keep when editing.

shape.description: Geometry of a generated shape clip.

width.description: Width in reference px (1080p-tall). Omit to keep when editing.

start.description: Where the clip begins on the timeline, in seconds.

track.description:
Target track id. Text goes on text tracks; solids and shapes go on
sticker (overlay) tracks.

tools.description: Replace generated clip content (text keeps styling). Not valid for media clips.
tools.name: set_generator

parameters.description:
Replace a generated clip's content (edit a title's text, recolor a
shape). Rejected for media-backed clips. Replacing the text of a text
clip keeps its current styling.

generator.description:
The replacement content, as a tagged object — e.g.
`{"type": "text", "content": "Hello"}`,
`{"type": "solid", "rgba": [0, 0, 0, 255]}`, or
`{"type": "shape", "shape": "ellipse", "rgba": [255, 0, 0, 255]}`.

oneOf.description: Solid color fill covering the canvas.
Filled vector shape centered on the canvas.

height.description: Height in reference px. Omit to keep when editing.

shape.description: Geometry of a generated shape clip.

width.description: Width in reference px (1080p-tall). Omit to keep when editing.

tools.description: Set canvas placement: position = anchor offset from canvas center (canvas fractions; [0,0]=centered), scale (number or [x,y]; 1.0=fit), rotation (deg CW about anchor), opacity. Omitted fields keep. Not for audio.
tools.name: set_clip_transform

parameters.description: Change a clip's canvas placement. Omitted fields keep their value.

anchor_x.description: Pivot in content bounds (0 = left, 0.5 = content center).

anchor_y.description: Pivot in content bounds (0 = top, 0.5 = content center).

position_x.description:
Anchor offset from canvas center, canvas-width fraction (+x right);
0 = centered, 0.5 = right edge.

position_y.description:
Anchor offset from canvas center, canvas-height fraction (+y down);
0 = centered.

anyOf.description: Uniform scale on both axes (1.0 = aspect-fit / CapCut 100%).

Per-axis clip scale on the wire: a bare number (uniform, legacy agents)
or `[x, y]` when split. Schema is `anyOf` number/array via untagged serde.

scale.description: Uniform number (1.0 = fit) or `[x, y]` per-axis.

tools.description: Crop by edge-trim fractions (0 restores) and/or flip_h/flip_v. Kept region still aspect-fits (crop does not move the layer). Not for audio.
tools.name: set_clip_crop

parameters.description:
Crop (edge trim fractions 0–1) and/or flip. Kept region still aspect-fits;
crop does not move the layer. Omitted fields keep their value.

bottom.description: Fraction trimmed from the bottom edge (0–1).

left.description: Fraction trimmed from the left edge (0 restores).

right.description: Fraction trimmed from the right edge (0–1).

top.description: Fraction trimmed from the top edge (0–1).

tools.description: Append a visual effect (e.g. gaussian_blur/radius, vignette/amount). Chain order; not for audio.
tools.name: add_effect

parameters.description: Append a visual effect to a clip's chain (catalog id, e.g. gaussian_blur).

tools.description: Remove an effect by chain index (0 = first). See describe_project.
tools.name: remove_effect

parameters.description: Remove an effect by chain index (0 = first).

tools.description: Reorder effects; from_index/to_index address the pre-move chain. See describe_project.
tools.name: move_effect

parameters.description: Reorder an effect; both indices address the pre-move chain.

to_index.description: Final index after the move (0 = first).

tools.description: Set an effect param: `value` scalars, `position` vec2, `rgba` colors. See describe_project for indices.
tools.name: set_effect_param

parameters.description: Set one effect parameter (catalog-range-checked).

rgba.description: `[r, g, b, a]` 0–255 for color effect params.

tools.description: Add a transition at the cut to the next abutting clip: crossfade, dip_to_black/white, wipe_*, slide. Not for audio.
tools.name: add_transition

parameters.description: Add a transition where `clip` abuts the next clip on its track.

tools.description: Remove the transition at a clip's right cut.
tools.name: remove_transition

parameters.description: Remove the transition at `clip`'s right cut.

tools.description: Set transition duration in seconds (window centered on the cut).
tools.name: set_transition

parameters.description: Set transition duration (seconds, positive); window centered on the cut.

seconds.description: Window length in seconds (must be positive).

tools.description: Add/replace a keyframe at timeline seconds. See `param` schema for selectors and value args (`value`/`position`/`rgba`/`rect`). Optional tangent_out/tangent_in are canvas-fraction handles for position motion paths only.
tools.name: set_param_keyframe

at.description: Absolute timeline seconds (must lie inside the clip).

param.description: Clip property. Strings: position|anchor_point|scale|rotation|opacity|crop|volume|pan. Tagged: {"effect":{"index":N,"param":effectParamName}}, {"shape|text|look|style":{"param":enum}}. Args: position=[x,y] = anchor offset from canvas center in canvas fractions (vec2 also: anchor_point, per-axis scale, mask_center/size, shadow_offset, vec2 effects); value=scalars (rot° CW about anchor, opacity 0..1, scale 1.0=fit, volume 0..10, pan −1..+1); rgba=[r,g,b,a] 0–255; rect=[x,y,w,h] content fractions (crop). volume/pan=media; crop=visual. Keyframe `at` = absolute timeline seconds inside the clip. For clip rate use set_clip_speed / set_speed_curve (not a keyframe param).

position.description:
Vec2 `[x,y]`. For position: anchor offset from canvas center
(canvas fractions; [0,0]=centered). Also per-axis scale / other vec2s.

tangent_in.description: Position motion-path in-handle (canvas-fraction offset from value).

tangent_out.description: Position motion-path out-handle (canvas-fraction offset from value).

tools.description: Remove a keyframe at timeline seconds (same `param` as set_param_keyframe). Last keyframe freezes the value.
tools.name: remove_param_keyframe

at.description: Timeline seconds of the keyframe to remove.

param.description: Clip property. Strings: position|anchor_point|scale|rotation|opacity|crop|volume|pan. Tagged: {"effect":{"index":N,"param":effectParamName}}, {"shape|text|look|style":{"param":enum}}. Args: position=[x,y] = anchor offset from canvas center in canvas fractions (vec2 also: anchor_point, per-axis scale, mask_center/size, shadow_offset, vec2 effects); value=scalars (rot° CW about anchor, opacity 0..1, scale 1.0=fit, volume 0..10, pan −1..+1); rgba=[r,g,b,a] 0–255; rect=[x,y,w,h] content fractions (crop). volume/pan=media; crop=visual. Keyframe `at` = absolute timeline seconds inside the clip. For clip rate use set_clip_speed / set_speed_curve (not a keyframe param).

tools.description: Set an animatable property to a fixed value and clear its keyframes (same `param`/value args as set_param_keyframe).
tools.name: set_param_constant

param.description: Clip property. Strings: position|anchor_point|scale|rotation|opacity|crop|volume|pan. Tagged: {"effect":{"index":N,"param":effectParamName}}, {"shape|text|look|style":{"param":enum}}. Args: position=[x,y] = anchor offset from canvas center in canvas fractions (vec2 also: anchor_point, per-axis scale, mask_center/size, shadow_offset, vec2 effects); value=scalars (rot° CW about anchor, opacity 0..1, scale 1.0=fit, volume 0..10, pan −1..+1); rgba=[r,g,b,a] 0–255; rect=[x,y,w,h] content fractions (crop). volume/pan=media; crop=visual. Keyframe `at` = absolute timeline seconds inside the clip. For clip rate use set_clip_speed / set_speed_curve (not a keyframe param).

position.description:
Vec2 `[x,y]`. For position: anchor offset from canvas center
(canvas fractions; [0,0]=centered).

tools.description: Replace the outgoing KF segment at from_tick with bounce_out/elastic_out/back_out. Needs a following keyframe; scalar/vec2 only.
tools.name: apply_easing_preset

from_tick.description: Timeline seconds of the departing keyframe (needs a following KF).

param.description: Clip property. Strings: position|anchor_point|scale|rotation|opacity|crop|volume|pan. Tagged: {"effect":{"index":N,"param":effectParamName}}, {"shape|text|look|style":{"param":enum}}. Args: position=[x,y] = anchor offset from canvas center in canvas fractions (vec2 also: anchor_point, per-axis scale, mask_center/size, shadow_offset, vec2 effects); value=scalars (rot° CW about anchor, opacity 0..1, scale 1.0=fit, volume 0..10, pan −1..+1); rgba=[r,g,b,a] 0–255; rect=[x,y,w,h] content fractions (crop). volume/pan=media; crop=visual. Keyframe `at` = absolute timeline seconds inside the clip. For clip rate use set_clip_speed / set_speed_curve (not a keyframe param).

preset.description: Multi-keyframe easing preset applied to the outgoing segment at `from_tick`.

tools.description: Set media playback speed (2.0=double, 0.5=slow-mo) and/or reverse. Length re-derives; audio time-stretches. Not for generated clips.
tools.name: set_clip_speed

parameters.description: Change a media clip's constant playback speed and/or direction.

reversed.description: Play footage backwards. Omit to keep.

speed.description:
Playback rate: 2.0 = double speed, 0.5 = slow-mo; range 0.05..100.
Timeline length re-derives; audio time-stretches. Omit to keep.

tools.description: Apply/clear a speed ramp preset (ramp_up, ramp_down, montage, hero, bullet). Length re-derives from average speed. Not for generated clips.
tools.name: set_speed_curve

parameters.description: Apply or clear a CapCut-style speed ramp on a media clip.

preset.description:
Preset: ramp_up, ramp_down, montage, hero, bullet. Null clears to
constant speed. Length re-derives from average speed.

tools.description: preserve_pitch true keeps pitch while time-stretching; false lets pitch follow speed. Retimed media only.
tools.name: set_clip_pitch

parameters.description: Lock or unlock pitch on a retimed media clip.

preserve_pitch.description: true = keep pitch while time-stretching; false = pitch follows speed.

tools.description: Set volume (0=mute, 1=unchanged, max 10) and/or fade-in/out seconds. Target video-with-sound or audio clips directly.
tools.name: set_clip_audio

parameters.description: Set a clip's volume gain and/or fade-in/out (seconds).

clip.description: Video clip with sound, or an audio clip.

fade_in.description: Fade-in seconds from clip start (0 clears). Omit to keep.

fade_out.description: Fade-out seconds ending at clip end (0 clears). Omit to keep.

volume.description: Gain: 0.0 mute, 1.0 unchanged, max 10. Omit to keep.

tools.description: Toggle speech-preserving denoise (steady hum/hiss/room tone). Media clips only; target video-with-sound directly.
tools.name: set_denoise

parameters.description: Enable/disable speech-preserving noise reduction on a media clip.

tools.description: Set/clear a mask (linear/mirror/circle/rectangle/heart/star). feather 0..1; center/size = layer fractions; rotation deg CW; roundness 0..1 (rectangle). Animate via look params. null clears.
tools.name: set_clip_mask

parameters.description: Set (or clear) a per-clip mask on a media-backed visual clip.

mask.description: Mask to apply. `null` clears the mask.

center.description:
Center offset from layer center as layer-size fractions
(`[0,0]` centered, `[0.5,0]` right edge). Default `[0,0]`.

kind.description:
Mask shape kinds (CapCut mask presets).

`mirror` is a parallel band (thickness = `size[0]` layer-width fraction)
centered on the mask line at `rotation`, not a half-plane.

rotation.description: Rotation degrees CW about mask center. Default 0.

roundness.description: Rectangle corner roundness 0…1 (other kinds ignore). Default 0.

size.description:
Size as layer-size fractions (`[1,1]` covers layer). For `mirror`,
`size[0]` is band thickness (width fraction). Default `[1,1]`.

tools.description: Set/clear chroma key on a media visual clip. null clears.
tools.name: set_clip_chroma

parameters.description: Set (or clear) chroma keying on a media-backed visual clip.

rgb.description: Key color as `[red, green, blue]`, each 0-255.

tools.description: Set/clear stabilize on a media video clip: recommended, smooth, max_smooth. null clears.
tools.name: set_clip_stabilize

parameters.description: Set (or clear) video stabilization on a media-backed video clip (not stills).

tools.description: Set/clear a color-grade filter (vivid, warm, cool, noir, …). null clears.
tools.name: set_clip_filter

parameters.description: Set (or clear) a color-grade filter preset on any visual clip.

intensity.description: Blend of the graded result over the original, 0 … 1. Defaults to 0.8.

tools.description: Set blend mode over layers below: normal, darken, multiply, color_burn, lighten, screen, color_dodge, add, overlay, soft_light, hard_light, difference, exclusion.
tools.name: set_clip_blend_mode

parameters.description: Set how a clip composites over the stack below (CapCut "Blend").

mode.description:
Blend mode id: normal, darken, multiply, color_burn, lighten,
screen, color_dodge, add, overlay, soft_light, hard_light,
difference, exclusion.

tools.description: Transform motion blur on a visual clip (not animatable): enabled, shutter_deg 0..720 (default 180), samples 2..32 (clamped to 16). Needs an animated transform.
tools.name: set_motion_blur

parameters.description: Transform motion blur (not animatable). Omitted fields keep current values.

shutter_deg.description: Shutter angle degrees (`0..=720`; 360 = full frame; 0 disables).

tools.description: Set layer shadow/glow/outline/background (reference px @1080p; not text glyph styles). Omitted blocks removed; empty styles clears all. Animate via style params.
tools.name: set_layer_styles

parameters.description: Replace layer styles; empty `styles` clears every block.

styles.description: Style blocks to install; omitted blocks are removed.

background.description: Solid plate behind layer alpha AABB. Lengths = reference px (1080p).

glow.description: Soft glow from layer alpha. Lengths = reference px (1080p); rgba 0–255.

outline.description: Hard outline around layer alpha. Width = reference px (1080p); rgba 0–255.

shadow.description: Drop shadow from layer alpha. Lengths = reference px (1080p); rgba 0–255.

offset.description: Offset in reference px (`+x` right, `+y` down).

tools.description: Manual color adjust: brightness/contrast/saturation/exposure/temperature/tint/hue/highlights/shadows (−1..1); sharpness/vignette (0..1). Omitted keep.
tools.name: set_clip_adjustments

parameters.description:
Manual color adjust. Signed sliders `-1..=1`; sharpness/vignette `0..=1`.
Omitted sliders keep their value.

tools.description: Set/clear look animation. Slots: in/out/combo. Optional speed 0.25–4, intensity 0–2, stagger 0–2 (text). null animation clears.
tools.name: set_clip_animation

parameters.description: Set or clear a look animation preset on a visual clip.

animation.description: Catalog id (e.g. fade_in, pulse). `null` clears the slot.

intensity.description: Motion/opacity magnitude `0..=2` (`1` = catalog). Omit for default.

slot.description: Animation slot (CapCut In / Out / Combo tabs).

speed.description: Playback rate `0.25..=4` (`1` = catalog). Omit for default.

stagger.description: Per-character stagger `0..=2` (text presets only). Omit for default.

tools.description: Tag an audio-lane clip: music, sfx, voiceover, extracted. null clears.
tools.name: set_audio_role

parameters.description: Tag (or untag) what an audio-lane clip is (music / sfx / voiceover / extracted).

role.description: Role to apply. `null` clears the tag.

tools.description: Split a clip at timeline seconds into two abutting clips.
tools.name: split_clip

parameters.description: Split a clip at a timeline position into two abutting clips.

at.description:
Timeline position of the cut, in seconds. Must fall strictly inside
the clip.

tools.description: Re-place/trim to new start and duration (seconds). Media head trim advances source in-point.
tools.name: trim_clip

parameters.description:
Re-place / trim a clip to a new timeline range. Trimming the head of a
media clip advances its source in-point to match (like dragging a trim
handle).

start.description: New timeline start of the clip, in seconds.

tools.description: Move a clip to a track at a new start (seconds), keeping duration.
tools.name: move_clip

parameters.description: Move a clip to a track at a new start time, keeping its duration.

to_track.description: Destination track id (may be the clip's current track).

tools.description: Remove a clip, leaving a gap.
tools.name: remove_clip

parameters.description: Remove a clip, leaving a gap where it sat.

tools.description: Remove a track and its clips. Main track (see describe_project) cannot be removed.
tools.name: remove_track

parameters.description: Remove a track and any clips still on it.

tools.description: Show or hide a visual track in the composite.
tools.name: set_track_enabled

parameters.description: Toggle whether a visual track contributes to the composite.

tools.description: Mute or unmute an audio track.
tools.name: set_track_muted

parameters.description: Toggle whether an audio track is silenced.

tools.description: Lock or unlock a track against editing.
tools.name: set_track_locked

parameters.description: Toggle whether a track's clips are editable (selection / move / trim).

tools.description: Remove a clip and slide later clips left to close the gap.
tools.name: ripple_delete

parameters.description: Remove a clip and slide later clips on its track left to close the gap.

tools.description: Shift clips on a track at/after a position by signed seconds.
tools.name: shift_clips

parameters.description:
Shift every clip on a track that starts at or after `from` by `delta`
seconds (negative shifts left). Rejected if a left shift would collide
with an earlier clip or push a clip before time 0.

from.description: Clips starting at or after this timeline position (seconds) shift.

tools.description: Insert trimmed media at timeline seconds, shifting later clips right.
tools.name: ripple_insert

parameters.description:
Insert a trimmed range of media at a timeline position, first shifting
every clip at or after that position right to make room.

at.description: Timeline position of the insert, in seconds.

media.description: Media pool id of the source file.

source_duration.description: Length of the source range to use, in seconds.

source_start.description: In-point within the source media, in seconds.

tools.description: Link two or more clips to select/move/trim together (replaces prior links).
tools.name: link_clips

parameters.description:
Put two or more clips into one link group: linked clips select, move,
and trim together. Replaces any previous links on those clips.

clips.description: Ids of the clips to link (at least two).

tools.description: Dissolve every link group touched by the given clip ids.
tools.name: unlink_clips

parameters.description:
Dissolve every link group touched by one or more clips. Naming any member
clears the complete group; distinct members of the same group are harmless
and coalesced by the engine.

clips.description:
Ids of linked clips whose complete groups should be dissolved. List
each clip id once; callers do not need to enumerate every group member.

tools.description: Drop a named, colored ruler marker at timeline seconds. Omit color to cycle palette.
tools.name: add_marker

parameters.description:
Drop a named, colored marker on the timeline ruler — an anchor for
navigation and for aligning edits ("cut at the marker", beat sync).

at.description: Timeline position of the marker, in seconds.

anyOf.description: Marker flag colors: palette name, #RRGGBB hex (same token describe_project emits), or custom opaque RGB.

oneOf.description: Custom opaque color as #RRGGBB (leading # optional; #RGB / #RRGGBBAA also accepted).
Custom opaque RGB. Field name `rgba` is historical; value is `[r, g, b]` (0–255), no alpha.

color.description: Flag color. Omit to cycle the palette automatically.

name.description:
Short label shown beside the flag (e.g. "Drop", "Beat 1"). Omit for
an unnamed marker.

tools.description: Remove a ruler marker by id.
tools.name: remove_marker

parameters.description: Remove a timeline marker.

tools.description: Move, rename, or recolor a ruler marker. Omitted fields keep.
tools.name: set_marker

parameters.description:
Move, rename, or recolor an existing timeline marker. Omitted fields
keep their current value.

at.description: New timeline position in seconds. Omit to keep the position.

anyOf.description: Marker flag colors: palette name, #RRGGBB hex (same token describe_project emits), or custom opaque RGB.

oneOf.description: Custom opaque color as #RRGGBB (leading # optional; #RGB / #RRGGBBAA also accepted).
Custom opaque RGB. Field name `rgba` is historical; value is `[r, g, b]` (0–255), no alpha.

color.description: New flag color. Omit to keep the color.

name.description: New label ("" clears it). Omit to keep the name.

tools.description: Set canvas aspect ('auto'|'16:9'|'9:16'|'1:1'|'4:5'|'21:9') and/or background color. Omitted keep.
tools.name: set_canvas

parameters.description:
Set the project canvas: the aspect-ratio preset the composite renders
at, and/or the background color shown where no clip covers the canvas.
Omitted fields keep their current value.

anyOf.description: Canvas aspect-ratio presets the agent may pick.

oneOf.description:
Follow the footage: canvas shape and size derive from the largest
video media on the timeline (the default).

aspect.description:
Canvas aspect preset: "auto" follows the footage; "16:9", "9:16",
"1:1", "4:5", and "21:9" fix the shape (clips re-fit automatically).
Omit to keep the current preset.

background.description:
Canvas background color as `[red, green, blue]`, each 0-255. Omit
to keep the current background.

tools.description: Get the current state of the project: tracks, clips with ids and times in seconds, the media pool, and the user's selection and playhead. Call this whenever you are unsure about ids or timing.
tools.name: describe_project

tools.description: Fetch the full step-by-step procedure of a skill by id. The available skills (id, name, and what they're for) are listed in the system prompt. Call this before starting a task a skill covers, then follow the returned procedure.
tools.name: read_skill

id.description: The skill id, exactly as listed in the system prompt.
